LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_ImplantDesc: Order this flesh intruder to rush a living target, leap into it, and try to lodge a burrowing organ in a random exposed body part. If the armor check fails, the intruder dies without implanting.
LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_MentalState: The flesh intruder cannot obey orders right now.
LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_MissingDefs: Flesh intruder implant data is missing.
LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_NoFriendlyTargets: Flesh intruders cannot be ordered into allied pawns.
LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_NoExternalPart: That target has no exposed body part to invade.
LanguageData.FB_FleshIntruder_CannotReach: The flesh intruder cannot reach that target.
